summary: Horizontal video. Grainy security/CCTV-style footage of a crowded JFK airport checkpoint where an ICE/TSA officer performs a Heimlich maneuver on an unresponsive infant. It is a single fixed-camera surveillance angle of the scene, showing TSA-vested staff, travelers, and baggage carts, with no graphics, titles, color grading, or music. There is no music track.
notable_text: Tweet describes ICE officer reviving an infant who stopped breathing at JFK; on-frame 'TSA' visible on staff vests
